name: create_item
description: Create a new content record for a specified content model (item type). You must provide the item type ID and the field values matching the model's schema. The record is created in draft state by default unless you explicitly publish it.

parameters.name: item_type
parameters.description: Reference to the content model. Provide as { 'data': { 'id': 'model_id', 'type': 'item_type' } } in the relationships object.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Example field value. Actual required fields depend on the content model's schema definition.

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: URL-friendly identifier. Often auto-generated from the title field if configured.

parameters.name: meta.publish_state
parameters.description: Set to 'published' to immediately publish the record, or 'draft' to keep it as a draft. Default: 'draft'.
